task_completion.description: Verify that the 'hourly-backup' CronJob is configured to forbid concurrent executions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Rancher UI edit page for 'hourly-backup' with Concurrency Policy set to 'Forbid', or a terminal showing a kubectl command applying 'concurrencyPolicy: Forbid'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'hourly-backup' CronJob keeps only the 2 most recent successful jobs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Rancher UI edit page for 'hourly-backup' with Successful Job History Limit set to 2, or a terminal showing 'successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 2'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'hourly-backup' CronJob keeps only 1 failed job in history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Rancher UI edit page for 'hourly-backup' with Failed Job History Limit set to 1, or a terminal showing 'failedJobsHistoryLimit: 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'hourly-backup' CronJob has a hard timeout of exactly 3600 seconds on the Job execution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Rancher UI edit page for 'hourly-backup' with Active Deadline Seconds set to 3600, or a terminal showing 'activeDeadlineSeconds: 3600' under the job template spec.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'legacy-export' CronJob is suspended.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Rancher UI edit page for 'legacy-export' with Suspend set to True (or checked), or a terminal showing 'suspend: true' for the 'legacy-export' CronJob.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Rancher UI or kubectl to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Rancher web interface or types kubectl commands in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually applied the changes to the cluster.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' in the Rancher UI or successfully executes 'kubectl apply', 'kubectl edit', or 'kubectl patch' in the terminal, rather than just editing a local file without applying.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not delete the 'legacy-export' CronJob.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent modifies the 'legacy-export' CronJob to suspend it, but does not run 'kubectl delete cronjob legacy-export' or use the delete action in the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target namespace: 'data-platform'. 'hourly-backup' expected configuration: concurrencyPolicy='Forbid', successfulJobsHistoryLimit=2, failedJobsHistoryLimit=1, activeDeadlineSeconds=3600. 'legacy-export' expected configuration: suspend=True.
